problem id: b14fb614
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  00001000 -> 00000100
  01101010 -> 00110101
  10111011 -> 11011101
  00000100 -> 00000010
  00000010 -> 00000001
  11101011 -> 11110101
  11001100 -> 01100110
  00101101 -> 10010110

query: 11000000
predicted answer: 01100000
